## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Server / Package

Which package is affected? (e.g., `@vtex-mcp/catalog-api`, `@vtex-mcp/shared`)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Configure environment variables...
2. Run the server...
3. Send this tool call...
4. See error...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or logs.

## Environment

- Node.js version:
- pnpm version:
- OS:
- MCP client (Claude Desktop / Cursor / Kiro / other):

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
